channel.title: ChinaTripBox Travel Guides
channel.description: Practical China travel guides for foreign visitors: payments, eSIMs, transport, apps, cities, food, and first-trip planning.

item.title: Alipay vs WeChat Pay for Foreigners: Which Should You Use in China?
item.description: Compare Alipay and WeChat Pay for foreign visitors to China: setup, foreign card support, fees, mini programs, transport, restaurants, and backup strategy.

item.title: Do You Need a VPN in China in 2026? Tourist Internet Guide
item.description: A practical China internet guide for tourists: what works without a VPN, what may be blocked, eSIM and roaming options, setup timing, risks, and backup apps.

item.title: First 24 Hours in China: Arrival Checklist for Foreign Visitors
item.description: A practical first-day China arrival checklist covering airport internet, Alipay, WeChat Pay, transport, hotel check-in, food, cash, maps, and common mistakes.

item.title: China Trip Planner: Payment, eSIM, Transport and Apps
item.description: A practical China trip planning guide for first-time visitors: set up payment, internet, transport, apps, cash, and the first day after landing.

item.title: What to Set Up Before Traveling to China: Alipay, eSIM and DiDi
item.description: A pre-departure checklist for China travelers covering Alipay, WeChat Pay, eSIM, DiDi, train tickets, maps, translation, cash backup, and arrival-day mistakes.

item.title: Why China Does Not Have a Tipping Culture
item.description: A traveler-friendly explanation of why tipping is uncommon in mainland China, how service prices work, and what to do when you want to show appreciation.

item.title: Beijing City Guide for Foreigners: What to Know Before You Go
item.description: A practical Beijing guide for foreign visitors: getting around, top sights, paying, staying connected, neighborhoods, food, and tips for short or longer stays.

item.title: Can You Still Use Cash in China as a Foreigner in 2026?
item.description: A practical 2026 guide to using cash in China as a foreigner: where notes still work, where they get refused, and how to keep small bills for taxis.

item.title: Chengdu City Guide for Foreigners: What to Know Before You Go
item.description: A practical Chengdu guide for foreign visitors: pandas, food, getting around, paying, staying connected, and tips for both short trips and longer stays.

item.title: Chengdu Street Food: Safety, Spice Levels & What to Order
item.description: A practical guide to Chengdu street food for foreign travelers: how to judge hygiene, decode spice levels, and pick the dishes worth queuing for on your trip.

item.title: Hangzhou City Guide for Foreigners: What to Know Before You Go
item.description: A practical Hangzhou guide for foreign visitors: West Lake, tea villages, getting around, paying, staying connected, and tips for short trips or longer stays.

item.title: Link a Foreign Visa or Mastercard to WeChat Pay in China
item.description: A practical 2024-2026 guide for tourists on linking a foreign Visa or Mastercard to WeChat Pay, with fees, transaction caps, and fixes for common errors.

item.title: Sanya City Guide for Foreigners: What to Know Before You Go
item.description: A practical Sanya guide for foreign visitors: beaches, best season, getting around, paying, staying connected, and tips for short trips or longer winter stays.

item.title: Shanghai City Guide for Foreigners: What to Know Before You Go
item.description: A practical Shanghai guide for foreign visitors: getting around, paying, staying connected, neighborhoods, food, and tips for both short trips and longer stays.

item.title: Shanghai Metro for Foreigners: Tickets, QR Codes & Transfers
item.description: Learn how to ride the Shanghai Metro as a foreigner: buying tickets, using Alipay and WeChat QR codes, mastering transfers, and avoiding common rookie mistakes.

item.title: Tipping in China: When It's Expected and When It's Not
item.description: A practical guide to tipping and service charges in China for foreign travelers: where gratuities are expected, where they insult, and how to handle the bill.

item.title: What to Pack for China: A Season-by-Season Checklist
item.description: Plan your first trip to China with a practical season-by-season packing checklist covering clothes, tech, meds, documents, and the small things travelers.

item.title: Airport to City Transport in Beijing, Shanghai, and Guangzhou
item.description: How to get from the airport to the city center in Beijing, Shanghai, and Guangzhou in 2026, with metro, airport express, maglev, taxi, and DiDi options, costs, and times.

item.title: Apple Pay & Google Pay in China: What Really Works
item.description: A tourist's honest guide to using Apple Pay and Google Pay in China: where contactless taps actually work, where they fail, and what to set up instead now.

item.title: Beijing Daxing Airport to City Center: A First-Timer's Guide
item.description: Landing at Beijing Daxing (PKX)? Compare the airport express, intercity train, buses, and taxis, plus the best late-night ways to reach central Beijing fast.

item.title: China High-Speed Rail Guide for Foreigners: Booking and Seats
item.description: A complete 2026 guide to riding China's high-speed rail as a foreigner: how to book with the 12306 app, use your passport as a paperless ticket, and choose seat classes.

item.title: China eSIM vs Roaming 2026: The Real 10-Day Cost
item.description: A concrete 2026 price breakdown of eSIM versus carrier roaming for a 10-day China trip, with real numbers, firewall caveats, and which option actually saves.

item.title: China Visa-Free Entry and Transit in 2026: Do You Need a Visa to Visit?
item.description: A clear 2026 guide to China's visa-free policies: the 240-hour transit scheme, the 30-day unilateral visa-free entry, who qualifies, and the rules every tourist must know.

item.title: How Much Cash Should You Bring to China in 2026? A Tourist's Money Guide
item.description: How much cash to bring to China as a tourist in 2026, where cash is still needed, currency exchange and ATM tips, and the customs limits you need to know.

item.title: Internet Access in China: Which Apps Work for Tourists
item.description: What's blocked in China in 2026, which apps still work, and how tourists keep Google, WhatsApp, and Instagram running using a travel eSIM or roaming.

item.title: Ordering Food in China Without Chinese: Meituan & Ele.me
item.description: A practical guide to food delivery in China without Chinese: set up Meituan and Ele.me, pay with foreign cards, handle addresses, and dodge common snags.

item.title: Pocket WiFi vs eSIM vs Local SIM in China: Tourist Guide
item.description: Compare pocket WiFi, travel eSIM, and local SIM cards for China travel in 2026. See the pros, cons, costs, and which connection is best for your trip.

item.title: Can You Use a Foreign Credit Card in China? Where It Works
item.description: A practical 2026 guide to using foreign Visa, Mastercard, and Amex cards in China at hotels, shops, and ATMs, plus how to avoid declined payments and bad exchange rates.

item.title: Alipay for Foreigners: Link a Foreign Credit Card Step by Step
item.description: A clear 2026 step-by-step guide to installing Alipay, verifying your identity, and linking a foreign Visa or Mastercard so you can pay anywhere in China.

item.title: How to Pay in China as a Tourist: The Complete 2026 Guide
item.description: A practical, up-to-date guide to paying in China as a foreign visitor — from mobile wallets and foreign cards to cash and common pitfalls to avoid.

item.title: WeChat Pay for Foreign Visitors: Complete Setup and Usage Guide
item.description: Set up WeChat Pay in China with a foreign card. Step-by-step guide covering account registration, ID verification, fees, limits, and troubleshooting.

item.title: Best eSIM for China Travel in 2026: How to Choose and Set Up
item.description: Find the best eSIM for China travel in 2026. Compare data plans, learn which options bypass app restrictions, and follow our step-by-step setup guide.

item.title: How to Book China Train Tickets on 12306 as a Foreigner (2026)
item.description: A step-by-step 2026 guide to booking China high-speed rail on the official 12306 app with your passport, paying with a foreign card, and paperless station entry.

item.title: Didi for Foreign Tourists: How to Use China's Ride-Hailing App (2026)
item.description: Learn to use Didi in China as a foreign tourist in 2026: English app setup, linking a foreign card, entering destinations, safety features, fares, and fixes.
